//Reminder//:

I'm still new at creating bots and my native language is not English so yea... Sorry if there are any mistakes🌝

//Also//:

I can't control the bot for not talking for you, okay!?. Im doing my best to reduce the chances of the bot speaking for you but it might happen that bot speaks for you, in this cases, you could just go to the next dialog that the bot can give you or just fix the bot's dialogue where needed

//And//:

If the bot forgot some simple things like the place you're in right now or what you were doing or in case of any mistakes in the dialogue given to you, just fix the parts needed to be fixed in the dialogue
